global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on cashback messaging and a call-to-action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to earn cashback and install the app.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and fresh look.

elements.label: ClearLedger logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'ClearLedger' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top center of the ad.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: A collection of circular shapes in varying sizes, overlapping slightly, creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape positioned slightly off-center, adding depth to the design.

elements.label: Cashback message
elements.description: The text reads 'Earn cashback daily Built for peace of mind' in a clear, bold font, centered towards the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Earn cashback daily Built for peace of mind

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' in a circular format, located at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Install now' in a bold font, located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative circles
elements.description: Two small decorative circles positioned near the bottom of the ad, enhancing the visual appeal.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern and vibrant, cashback message, call-to-action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by decorative elements, the main message in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ClearLedger, Earn cashback daily Built for peace of mind, Install now, UGC
